shipping: EverShop ships across the country. Standard shipping is 3-5 business days and is free on orders over $50. Express shipping (1-2 business days) is $12.99 flat. International orders are not currently supported. Orders placed before 2 PM ship the same day; orders after 2 PM ship the next business day.
returns: Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for unused items in original packaging. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days to the original payment method. Final-sale items, intimates, and personalized goods are non-returnable. Customers cover return shipping unless the item arrived damaged or incorrect — in which case EverShop pays.
warranty: All electronics carry a 1-year limited manufacturer's warranty against defects. Watches over $1000 carry a 2-year EverShop service warranty in addition to the manufacturer's warranty. Apparel, jewelry, and shoes are sold as-is and do not carry an explicit warranty, but damaged-on-arrival items are eligible for a free replacement or refund within 30 days.
payment: EverShop accepts Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal. Buy-now-pay-later via Klarna is available on orders over $50. Cryptocurrency and money orders are not currently accepted.
contact: For order support, email orders@evershop.example or use the live chat (Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 6 PM EST). For vendor inquiries, email vendors@evershop.example.
